title: Akeyless Auth Request
description: Schema for authenticating to Akeyless and obtaining an access token via /auth.

access-id.description: The access ID of the auth method.

access-key.description: The access key for API key authentication.

cloud-id.description: The cloud identity token for cloud-provider IAM authentication (AWS, Azure, GCP).

k8s-service-account-token.description: Kubernetes service account JWT token for K8S authentication.

k8s-auth-config-name.description: The name of the Kubernetes auth configuration in Akeyless.

cert-data.description: PEM-encoded client certificate for certificate-based authentication.

key-data.description: PEM-encoded private key for certificate-based authentication.

gateway-url.description: Akeyless Gateway URL for self-hosted deployments.
